    Founder

    Petr Bakulov
    CEO and Founder

    Entrepreneur and scientist. 15+ years of automotive business. Inventor, author and leader of V2M. Former professor of "Transport Telematics" and racing driver.

    OPEN LINKEDIN PROFILE
    TEAM

    Powered by a dedicated group of researchers, engineers, and technology experts with a shared ambition to transform automotive diagnostics

    Igor Kordunsky
    R&D Leader

    R&D team leader and contributor for 25+ years: DFM, motion, algorithms, electronics, data acquisition, actuators, and sensors. Proficient in 3D modelling and FEA, and PCB design.

    Andrew Maltsev
    Engineer

    With more than 35 years of hands-on experience. Graduate with honors, Andrew excels in electrical engineering, PCB design, radio electronics, and electro-acoustics.

    Anton Labozin
    Technology Consultant

    20+ years in IT, skilled in software and hardware. Expertise in circuit design (analog, digital, power), embedded systems, OS kernels, and drivers. Strong backend experience (big data, high-load DBs, fault tolerance) and frontend development for web and mobile.

    Tommaso La Vigni
    Automotive Engineering Consultant

    With Italian roots and a natural feel for automotive culture, Tommaso’s early interest in cars grew into a hands-on passion for working on vehicles across different platforms. He enjoys building, maintaining, and improving cars himself—focusing on practical engineering and lifelong learning.

    Roman Gordeev
    C&I Research Scientist

    An engineer, software developer, project manager, co-founder, and CEO. Roman's path to success from ground zero adds invaluable expertise to V2M.

    Aleksandr Iovlev
    AI Engineer

    A ML research engineer and educator, combining a passion for AI with a strong background in hardware design and embedded systems to drive innovative solutions in technology.

    Vladislav Zaigraev
    Engineer

    An experienced AI specialist with a strong technical and mathematical background, specializing in speech, language, and audio analysis.

    Sergey Surguchev
    AI Engineer

    Machine learning engineer specializing in computer vision. Developer of visual perception systems for the Formula Student Driverless team.

    Valya Moleva
    Communication Designer

    A multidisciplinary designer with over 11 years of expertise in visual presentation of ideas across all platforms and touchpoints.

    Oleg Shevchenko
    Front-End Developer

    5+ years of experience specializing in Angular and Ionic. Skilled in building scalable web and mobile applications, optimizing performance, and implementing modern UI/UX solutions.

    Anton Kaplun
    Strategic Advisor

    Anton specializes in designing winning GTM strategies and operations for startups. Most recently, he contributed to the successful growth and funding of Clio and AppZen.

    Vladimir Ezhov
    IT Specialist

    Vladimir is an IT guru and geek.

    V2M

    Pioneering Computer hearing, creating solutions for on-board diagnostics using sound and AI.
